title: Neoporteria megliolii
taxonomy: Neoporteria megliolii is classified within the Cactaceae family, which is the largest family of flowering plants. This plant belongs to the genus Neoporteria, a group of columnar cacti native to the Atacama Desert in Chile. Neoporteria megliolii is also classified as a species of flowering plant. Within the Neoporteria genus, it is often placed in the subgenus Eriosyce, which includes various species of columnar cacti. More specifically, it is often further classified within the subgenus Eriosyce, section Eriosyce, and even subsection Eriosyce.
benefits: Neoporteria megliolii is a type of plant that has been studied for its potential health benefits.
